import React from 'react'; function Trade(props) { console.log(props.userTrades) return(
{props.userTrades.id} {props.userTrades.stock} {props.userTrades.method} {props.userTrades.quantity} {props.userTrades.profitLoss} props.deleteHandler(props.userTrades.id)}>
) } export default Trade;
